About us

Business software from Panama
for SMBs across four countries.

SuiteHub is the result of more than a decade understanding how Spanish-speaking businesses actually operate. Today a PROOQ LLC (USA) product, with local operations in Panama via PROOQ S.A., and active expansion to USA, Venezuela, and Spain.

Who we are

SuiteHub, multi-country business suite.

SuiteHub is a multi-jurisdiction business management platform for SMBs across Panama, USA, Venezuela, and Spain, with electronic invoicing adaptable to each jurisdiction, multi-branch, and growth without migrations.

We are not a reseller of foreign software. Every line of SuiteHub code is written thinking about how a workshop in La Chorrera invoices, how a Hispanic restaurant in Chicago operates, how a clinic in Bella Vista books appointments.

A PROOQ LLC (USA) product. Local operations in Panama through PROOQ S.A.

2020
SuiteHub founded
+30
Active SMBs (PA)
12
Verticals
4
Target countries
Elmwood Park, Chicago IL · USA (PROOQ LLC)
Vía Argentina, Bella Vista · Panama
Calle La Línea 15, Puerto Real · Andalucía, Spain
How we work

Four principles we don't compromise on.

Pragmatic

We don't sell technology because it's trendy. Every feature exists because it solves a real pain measured in a real customer.

Close

A WhatsApp message and we reply. No tickets, no support tiers. SMBs don't need corporate protocols.

Rigorous

Certified electronic invoicing, code with automated tests, daily backups. Your operation isn't an experiment.

Fast

Setup in 24 hours. Small changes the same day. SMBs can't wait for 6 months of corporate implementation.

Our journey

From day one to today.

  1. 2020

    SuiteHub is born

    We launch SuiteHub with one premise: enterprise software built for the Spanish-speaking SMB, not translated from another market.

  2. 2026 Q1

    First DGI Panama electronic invoice

    QS Express issues the first electronic invoice with SuiteHub. Zero rejections in production from day one.

  3. 2026 Q2

    Launch of the HUB family

    Four editions (Lite/Core/Pro/Enterprise) + 12 specialized verticals.

  4. 2026

    Multi-country repositioning

    SuiteHub becomes a PROOQ LLC (USA) product with local operations in Panama via PROOQ S.A. Soft launch in USA, Venezuela, and Spain.

  5. Today

    +30 active SMBs in Panama

    Workshops, restaurants, retail, clinics, vets and more invoicing with SuiteHub across Panama. USA/Venezuela/Spain in evaluation.

The team

Small, focused, accessible.

We're a compact team: development, support and sales. When you contract SuiteHub you talk to whoever writes the code, not a call-center agent. Closeness is our advantage.

Want to meet the team?
Book a call

Let's build something together.

If your SME is ready to take the digital leap, let's talk. We'll show you SuiteHub live and help you decide if it fits your operation.

WhatsApp Email

SuiteHub is the business management platform for SMBs across Panama, USA, Venezuela, and Spain that want enterprise-grade technology without the complexity or cost.
